title: Close execution plan phases 1–2 (HIR + typing)
body:
Updated the execution plan to mark **Phase 1** (HIR foundations) and **Phase 2** (typing integration) complete and scoped **Phase 3** kickoff (lowering/runtime).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`01db952`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/01db952)
- **Subject:** Update execution plan with Phase 1/2 completion status and Phase 3 kickoff scope
- **Completed:** 2026-02-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-execution-jit-gc`

## Relation
The execution plan was the program-management spine for JIT/runtime work—linking analysis milestones to codegen and GC tasks in the same deliverable. Unblocked lowering architecture, gc-arena integration, and Phase 5 runtime/GC completion tasks.

source.subject: Update execution plan with Phase 1/2 completion status and Phase 3 kickoff scope
